category_sources: source_facts.description expands RANCID name; official Shrubbery page says RANCID monitors router/device configurations and maintains change history.
display_name_sources: Official Shrubbery page title uses RANCID - Really Awesome New Cisco confIg Differ; source_facts.name is rancid.
docs_sources: Official Shrubbery RANCID page includes getting started, FAQ link, online man pages, and source repository notes.
repo_sources: Official Shrubbery source repository section lists dev head and release tags at github.com/haussli/rancid, while noting GitHub is not canonical and may lag.
tags_sources: Official Shrubbery page describes router/device configuration monitoring, diffs, email alerts, and CVS/Subversion/Git history.
